name: quantumentangledcheck
title: Quantum Entangled Check
description: Quantum Entangled Check A 100/100 world-first checkbox. Instead of a simple tick, two glowing "entangled" particles fly from the box corners and collide in the center to form the checkmark with a quantum discharge effect.
